name: IDmission
description: IDmission offers AI-driven identity verification combining document authentication, facial biometrics, liveness and contextual risk signals for customer onboarding across finance, telecom and government.

seo.title: IDmission — KYC / KYB / AML API
seo.meta_description: IDmission: IDmission offers AI-driven identity verification combining document authentication, facial biometrics, liveness and contextual risk signals for custo

when_to_use: AI document authentication for telecom SIM card issuance
Liveness and biometric KYC for government service portals
Contextual risk scoring at onboarding for fraud prevention
Face match API for financial account re-authentication
Automated ID extraction and OCR for onboarding form fill

pros: Contextual risk signals reduce false accepts
Deployed across finance, telecom and government
Global coverage with multilingual document support
cons: Smaller brand than Jumio, Onfido or Incode
UI and dashboards trail newer competitors
Less published research on model performance
review.verdict: Respectable full-stack IDV vendor, but you'll likely shortlist it only if incumbents are disqualified.
review.best_for: Banks, telcos and government issuers needing multimodal IDV across multiple countries
review.not_for: Teams that want a clear best-of-breed brand with strong published benchmarks and community

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact-sales alone is not HWM evidence.
